price: und gewiß, auf dir liegt Mein Fluch bis zum Tag des Gerichts.
arabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيۡكَ لَعۡنَتِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wa-inna ʿalayka laʿnatī ilā yawmi al-dīni
